title: Weekly Insights Review
summary:
Read here everything you need to know
Dry bulk spot rates move closer to seasonal averages as summer begins - With the strongest first quarter for Capesizes in 14 years behind us, dry bulk rates have now moved closer to the typical rate for this time of the year, with the Baltic Dry Index sitting at roughly 15% above the 7-year average. Read More
Image reference: Dry+Report+Top.png | assets/2024-05-31_weekly-insights-review_img_dry2breport2btop_c29fc0ecfd5d.png
Image reference: image-asset.jpeg | assets/2024-05-31_weekly-insights-review_img_image-asset_49b2e0dc39fb.jpeg
Doric Weekly Market Insight
Baltic indices continue to express skepticism about the tangible impact of the latest Chinese measures, with trends mostly sideways during the twenty-first trading week. Read More
Image reference: image-asset (1).jpeg | assets/2024-05-31_weekly-insights-review_img_image-asset28129_ada46d3b9bd9.jpeg
From Commodore's Weekly Dry Bulk Reports
April ended with 746 million square meters of floor space available in China's commercial buildings (which includes residential buildings).
